title: VexxSMP
description: Vanilla+ style modpack for the Vexxinated discord server
body:
## Vanilla+ Experience
- Enhanced World Gen, Slight Visual Upgrades, FPS Optimization and Various Improvements that dont stray too far from the Vanilla Experience.

## Some Available Mods 
1. [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), For those beautiful shaders.
2. [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular), for the cozy enhanced rain.
3. [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip), because who doesn't want to see inside their shulker at a glimpse.

## Reason why YOU may want to play this pack?
- It offers a chill, relaxed, and not too out of touch Vanilla Experience. 

## This is a pack for the Vexxinated Minecraft server.
### Some resourcepacks I recommend using: 
- [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) 
- [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils)
- [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
